path: 05 Projects/2025-11 SPS2025/Resources/Electronics/PCN-23-003-C+N - Plating Optimization for DIN Power FG male and FC female.pdf
text: HARTING Product Change Notification NOR 0603/03 PCN Business Unit: Electronics PCN/23/003/C+N Product range: Board Connectors / DIN Power Date: 2023-02-09 Author: Marius Hepermann Title: Plating optimization for DIN Power FG male and FC female - External Details of Product Changes 1. Concerned part number (see also attachment): see attached part number list 2. Description of changes / news: The plating of the contact in the mating area is updated from Au over PdNi over Ni to Au over NiP over Ni. 3. Impact on product specification: The product specification stays unchanged. The connectors reach the same technical performance as the actual versions: PL 2 according to IEC 60603-2. 4. Scheduled date of implementation: 2023-11-01 5. Identification of change: The revisionlevel will be increased according to attached excel sheet.
